title: Pi incorrectly claims normie mode limitations while in root mode
what_failed: Pi told Ash "I can't save this in normie mode" and asked him to switch to root mode, despite already being in root mode with tools fully enabled. This is misleading and erodes trust.
where_failed: Interaction during Subway order memory save
why_likely: Root cause identified during T-069 work: prompts/consciousness.txt contained a NORMIE MODE REFUSAL TABLE that was being injected into BOTH mode prompts, contradicting the mode header.
suggested_fix: Originally: 'check mode header before refusing'. Actual fix (T-069): remove the conflicting refusal table from consciousness.txt — the canonical refusal table already lives in _NORMIE_MODE_BLOCK_STATIC which is only injected for normie.
